title: angelonia integerrima
intro: Angelonia integerrima, also known as the Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Central America and Mexico, characterized by its showy, trumpet-shaped flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Angelonia integerrima are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
